stemHtml: If a thunderstorm (CB) 10 miles ahead is assessed as still being in the mature phase, what should a pilot of a light aircraft do?

options.a: He should cross the storm on the shortest possible way.
options.b: He should start a descent in order to pass underneath the storm.
options.c: He should climb above the storm.
options.d: He should change heading to circumnavigate the storm.
